player: No hills. No trees. Nothing to hide behind.
maya: Aerial Sentinels patrol in grids. Twenty-second sweep intervals.
Move between sweeps. Stand still when you hear the rotors.
Too close. They're widening the grid.
We need to get off the highway.

player: Old grain depot. We can rest here.
maya: Signal reads clean. Harvest Town is two miles east.
The maps show it as a voluntary settlement.
That means everyone there chose this.
